Escape Room: Tournament of Champions (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,314,753Details
International Box Office $28,178,311
Worldwide Box Office $53,493,064
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $867,858
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,126,990
Total $1,994,848
Further financial details...

Synopsis

An intriguing invitation brings six strangers together. Initially, they think they have gathered for a highly immersive escape room, but they soon make the sickening discovery that they are pawns in a sadistic game of life and death. Together, they move from one terrifying scenario to the next as they find clues and solve puzzles. But the players soon learn that exposing their darkest secrets may hold the key to survive.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,801,391 (34.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.88 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,815 opening theaters/2,815 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,770,354

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 16th, 2021 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: July 1st, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
July 1st, 2021 (Limited) (Australia)
July 14th, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
July 15th, 2021 (Wide), released as Escape Room 2 (Australia)
July 15th, 2021 (Wide), released as 密室逃殺: 倖存者遊戲 (Hong Kong)
Video Release: September 21st, 2021 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, terror/peril and strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2680 (cert #52337), 5/12/2021)
Running Time: 88 minutes
Franchise: Escape Room
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Escape, Shadowy Organization, Trapped
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Original Film
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

An intriguing invitation brings six strangers together. Initially, they think they have gathered for a highly immersive escape room, but they soon make the sickening discovery that they are pawns in a sadistic game of life and death. Together, they move from one terrifying scenario to the next as they find clues and solve puzzles. But the players soon learn that exposing their darkest secrets may hold the key to survive.
